use_cases: Visualize daily booking slots with meeting counts in a compact calendar grid view
Display scheduling availability with hover interactions to preview meeting details
Show weekly or monthly booking density with animated visual feedback
Enable quick overview of appointments across multiple days in a single component
Provide a scheduling interface for appointment-based services
ai_summary: A booking visualization calendar component that displays days in a grid layout with meeting counts and animated hover interactions. Uses Framer Motion for smooth transitions and reveals meeting information on hover. Designed with a dark theme suitable for dashboard interfaces in scheduling applications.
